titleStmt.title: SII 20.128: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 128. (B.K. No. 36 of 1936-37.) KAḌLĒVĀḌ, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the Svāmiliṅga Temple.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 4, Parābhava, Chaitra, Puṇṇami, Sunday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1186, April 5. The week-day was, however, Saturday.

The inscription records a gift of income from taxes, of manne and mēlāḷke by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kopparasa and others to god Svayaṁbhu-Sōmanātha of Kaḍalevāḍa for worship, offerings, etc. The gift was entrusted to Sōvarāsidēva, the āchārya of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu cāḷukyacakravarttiThis is
tribhuvanamalla sōmēśvaradēvavarṣada 4 neya parābhava saṁvatsarada caitra
suddha puṇnami Ādivāradaṁdu vyatīpāta sōmagrahaṇa puṇyatithi nimi
ttavāgi . © svasti śrīmatu koppēśvaradēvara divyaśrīpādārādhaka para
baḷasādhakaṁ nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahāmaṁ
ḍaḷēśvaraṁ kopparasaruṁ tamma Ammarasanuṁ sōyidēvanuṁ Allarasanuṁ kumā
ra ḍākayyanuṁ hadineṁṭu saṁtatigaḷu sahitavāgi hiṁcagēriya
maṁneya mēlāḷkeyuṁ prabhutvada Arddha māṁnya bāhira sīmeyoḷagaṇa ni
dhinidhānanikṣēpa jalapāṣāṇamāḷāvrikṣagulmalatāvaḷḷicaturāghā
ṭa kallakaṇi yeṁṭu hiṭṭu mūliga Aruvaṇa hiṭṭudeṟe hoḷeda Aṣṭabhō
ga tējasāmya daṁḍadōṣa kāṇike kiṟukuḷa Āyadāya sarvvāya
suddhavāgi yintinituvaṁ AgastyamahariśiĀśrama dakṣiṇavāraṇāsi kaḍa
levāḍada śrīsvayaṁbhu sōmanāthadēvara Aṁgaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭi
ta jīrnnōdhārakkaṁ tapōdhanara Āśana Ācchādanakkaṁ . svasti yamaniyamāsana
prāṇāyāmapratyāhāradhyānadhāraṇa mōnānuṣṭhāna japasamādhiśīla
guṇasaṁpaṁnaruṁ vibudhajanamanōvāṁtsita phalavamutpaṁnaruṁ
dīnānāthajaṭharadāvapāvakanivāraṇa nijasamayasaraṇayikarakṣa
dakṣananavaratasubhikṣapaṁḍitacūḍāmaṇigaḷuṁ śiṣṭajanacintāmaṇigaḷa
ppa piriya maṭhadācāryya sōvarāsidēvargge pādaprakṣālanaṁ māḍi tribhō
gābhyantaraṁ sarvvanamasyavāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . © maṁ
gaḷa mahā śrī śrī . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhi
varṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . madvaṁśajāḥ paramahīpativaṁ
śajā vā vāpādapētamanasā bhuvi bhūmibhūpāḥ tē pālayaṁtu ma
ma dharmmamidaṁ samastaṁ tēṣāṁ mayā viracitāṁjaḷirēṣa mūrdhni .
Digital edition of SII 20.128 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
